acceptance_targets: [CH07-F001] PASS if, in the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161-176 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:297-375, at least two consequences are rendered as observable action/reaction with no explanatory moral line attached in the same paragraph; FAIL if the scene still resolves through explicit lesson language before the concrete consequence lands.

[CH07-F002] PASS if the revised chapter contains at least one on-page accountability attempt between meeting confession and final paragraph that produces a new setback not immediately resolved in the same scene; FAIL if every major recovery step still succeeds in one attempt.

[CH07-F003] PASS if at least half of Luis's revised lines in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161-166, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:297-302 contain no transit/route/bus metaphor while preserving his direct sponsor posture; FAIL if those spans still stack repeated transit analogies line after line.

[CH07-F004] PASS if, in the revised cited spans, each of the three speakers has at least one line whose syntax/word choice is not plausibly interchangeable with the others; FAIL if the lines still read as the same authorial cadence with swapped names.

[CH07-F005] PASS if the revised cited lines contain no more than one repeated-'and' triadic stack across all four targets and each target paragraph ends on a concrete physical detail rather than an abstract thesis sentence; FAIL if the same stacking formula still appears in multiple targets.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161-176 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:297-375, at least two consequences are rendered as observable action/reaction with no explanatory moral line attached in the same paragraph; FAIL if the scene still resolves through explicit lesson language before the concrete consequence lands.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift appears as moral safety-valve framing: the relapse is repeatedly translated into explicit lesson statements, which pre-interprets the damage and reduces narrative discomfort instead of letting consequence stand on its own.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the didactic beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:175, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:371 by replacing abstract thesis lines with concrete pressure beats (failed outreach, renewed concealment impulse, or immediate logistical fallout) that force Marisol to act before anyone summarizes the meaning.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter contains at least one on-page accountability attempt between meeting confession and final paragraph that produces a new setback not immediately resolved in the same scene; FAIL if every major recovery step still succeeds in one attempt.
findings.problem: The chapter's core conflict runs in a largely unbroken compliance arc once Luis enters: confession, chip reset, and institutional amends all execute on first pass, which lowers unpredictability and weakens Booker-level dramatic counterforce.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the middle-to-late sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:185, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:321 so at least one accountability step partially fails or worsens stakes (social, financial, or relational), and carry that unresolved friction into the ending at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:375.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least half of Luis's revised lines in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161-166, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:297-302 contain no transit/route/bus metaphor while preserving his direct sponsor posture; FAIL if those spans still stack repeated transit analogies line after line.
findings.problem: Luis's idiolect over-literalizes his style-bible stress signature: repeated route/bus/checklist metaphors dominate multiple exchanges, making the voice feel mechanically programmed rather than situationally alive.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:161-166, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:297-302, keep one transit metaphor per exchange maximum and replace the rest with plainspoken, emotionally specific lines that still fit Luis's moderate-contraction, accountability-first register.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised cited spans, each of the three speakers has at least one line whose syntax/word choice is not plausibly interchangeable with the others; FAIL if the lines still read as the same authorial cadence with swapped names.
findings.problem: Several secondary speakers (Eileen, the Cypress grandmother, Marcy) converge toward similarly polished, quote-ready phrasing, reducing idiolect separation and making pressure-specific register differences less distinct than required.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retune speech at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:215, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:267, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:325-352 so each speaker carries a unique rhythm and lexical field tied to role: AA ritual brevity for Eileen, colloquial bluntness for the grandmother, administrative precision for Marcy.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited lines contain no more than one repeated-'and' triadic stack across all four targets and each target paragraph ends on a concrete physical detail rather than an abstract thesis sentence; FAIL if the same stacking formula still appears in multiple targets.
findings.problem: A recurring sentence formula appears more than twice: stacked triads using repeated 'and' plus abstract capstone phrasing. The repetition flattens cadence and makes key beats feel rhetorically pre-shaped.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:371, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:375 with differentiated sentence shapes (one clipped declarative, one sensory-heavy extension, one action-anchored close) and remove repeated 'X and Y and Z' stacking except where absolutely necessary for emphasis.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
